SEARCH

Uses of Package
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.authorization

Packages that use org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.authorization
Package
Description
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine
Public API of the Camunda Platform engine.

Typical usage of the API starts by the creation of a
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.ProcessEngineConfiguration
(typically based on a configuration file), from which a
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.ProcessEngine
can be obtained.

Through the services obtained from such a
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.ProcessEngine
, BPM and workflow operation can be executed:

invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.RepositoryService
: Manages
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.repository.Deployment
s
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.RuntimeService
: For starting and searching
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.runtime.ProcessInstance
s
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.TaskService
: Exposes operations to manage human (standalone)
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.task.Task
s, such as claiming, completing and assigning tasks
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.IdentityService
: Used for managing
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.identity.User
s,
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.identity.Group
s and the relations between them
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.ManagementService
: Exposes engine admin and maintenance operations, which have no relation to the runtime execution of business processes
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.HistoryService
: Exposes information about ongoing and past process instances.
invalid reference 
org.camunda.bpm.engine.FormService
: Access to form data and rendered forms for starting new process instances and completing tasks.
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.authorization
 
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.impl
API implementation classes, which shouldn't directly be used by end-users.

  • Classes in org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.authorization used by org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine
    Class
    Description
    Authorization
    An Authorization assigns a set of Permissions to an identity to interact with a given Resource.
    AuthorizationQuery
     
    MissingAuthorization
    Wrapper containing the missing authorization information.
    Permission
    A permission represents an authorization to interact with a given resource in a specific way.
    Resource
    Resources are entities for which a user or a group is authorized.
  • Classes in org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.authorization used by org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.authorization
    Class
    Description
    AuthorizationQuery
     
    BatchPermissions
    The set of built-in Permissions for Batch operations in Camunda Platform.
    HistoricProcessInstancePermissions
    The set of built-in Permissions for Historic Process Instance in Camunda Platform.
    HistoricTaskPermissions
    The set of built-in Permissions for Historic Task in Camunda Platform.
    OptimizePermissions
    Deprecated.
    These permissions have no effect
    Permission
    A permission represents an authorization to interact with a given resource in a specific way.
    Permissions
    The set of built-in Permissions for Camunda Platform.
    ProcessDefinitionPermissions
    The set of built-in Permissions for Process definition in Camunda Platform.
    ProcessInstancePermissions
    The set of built-in Permissions for Process instances in Camunda Platform.
    Resource
    Resources are entities for which a user or a group is authorized.
    Resources
    The set of built-in Resource names.
    SystemPermissions
     
    TaskPermissions
    The set of built-in Permissions for Task in Camunda Platform.
    UserOperationLogCategoryPermissions
    The set of built-in Permissions for User operation log based on categories in Camunda Platform.
    VariablePermissions
